data.name: romance.exe
data.detailed_description:
Walking the line between right and wrong is never easy—especially when you're broke, burnt out, and chasing a dream you can barely hold onto. After walking away from a lucrative corporate job to develop your own romantic visual novel, you're now struggling to finish the project while keeping your life from falling apart.

As an indie developer with no funding, no studio, and no backup plan, you must rely on the people around you—not just for emotional support, but to help fill the gaps in your project: music, art, marketing, everything. But leaning on friends comes with a price. Can you ask for help without crossing boundaries? And what are you willing to give in return?

You'll form deep, evolving relationships with four women whose lives become increasingly entwined with yours:

  • Sonia – Your best friend’s wife. Irresistible, unpredictable, and dangerously close.

  • Chloe – Your childhood friend and emotional anchor. Loyal, sharp, and maybe harboring feelings of her own.

  • Lalana – Your flirty neighbor with a teasing smile and an open heart—though her connection to Chloe complicates things.

  • Erica – Your seductive, enigmatic dentist. She knows how to push your buttons... and cross your boundaries.

Every decision you make will shape your story—from emotional bonds to moral choices, from comfort to betrayal. Will you stay loyal to John and finally cut ties with Sonia? Pursue something honest with Chloe? Surrender to Lalana’s bold advances and fall into an unexpected power game? Or explore the dark, enticing depths of Erica’s twisted affection?

Gameplay Features:

  • A choice-driven visual novel with branching dialogue, emotional weight, and seductive tension

  • Erotic, story-integrated sex scenes—never gratuitous, always meaningful

  • No grinding, no stat management—just pure, story-focused gameplay

  • Deep character relationships built through comfort, trust, manipulation… or desire

  • Optional mini-games and coding segments tied to Daniel’s development struggles

  • Immersive sound and atmosphere, with a cinematic approach to pacing and tone

Next-Gen Visual Experience:

This is a major step forward from anything we’ve built before.
Enjoy 2K visuals, high-resolution custom character models, and beautifully detailed locations crafted to heighten immersion. Every scene uses dynamic camera angles and cinematic composition to pull you directly into the protagonist’s perspective - making each choice, kiss, and confrontation feel undeniably real.

Experience sex scenes animations like never before - brought to life with our cutting-edge rendering techniques. Enjoy breathtaking fluidity, multiple dynamic camera angles, and an unprecedented level of realism that builds unbearable erotic tension with every moment.

Are you ready to finish the game of your dreams—without losing yourself in the process? Or will romance.exe crash under the weight of your desires?

data.short_description: Daniel’s chasing his dream - and his desires. As a broke indie dev, you’ll code by day and navigate temptation by night. Seduce, betray, or build real connection with four stunning women. No stat grinding - just bold choices, spicy scenes, and emotionally charged consequences.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz+
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphic card with at least 256 MB
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz+
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphic card with at least 256 MB
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.10+
  • 處理器: Both Apple Silicon and Intel
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.10+
  • 處理器: Both Apple Silicon and Intel
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
